block.text: To your horror, you are caught in a downdraught! Your robot falls, spinning. You are thrown against the side Of the cockpit. Around you, metal shrieks. Lose 2 STAMINA points; your robot loses 2 ARMOUR points. If either STAMINA or ARMOUR is reduced too, you aredead. If not, you have a chance to regain control. Turn to 12.
